text:
Upgrade chinese/joe , fix building errors due to recent editors/joe change

Fix: PATCH_SITES=   ftp://mail.elife.idv.tw/pub/work/collection/cjoe/

+PATCHFILES=    zh-joe-2.8_3-patch
